query:
SELECT
            p.name AS product_name,
            SUM(si.quantity) AS "quantity_sold!",
            SUM(si.line_total) AS "revenue!"
        FROM sale_items si
        JOIN sales s ON s.id = si.sale_id
        JOIN products p ON p.id = si.product_id
        WHERE s.tenant_id = $1
        GROUP BY p.name
        ORDER BY SUM(si.line_total) DESC
        LIMIT 5
